_meta.note: Pre-baked briefs served in DEMO_MODE (settings.demo_mode). Re-run WITH ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to capture real claude-sonnet-4-6 output; 'template' entries are deterministic fallbacks.

st-thomas.subject: [AMBER] Respiratory readiness — St Thomas' Hospital (+1d lead)
st-thomas.situation: A localised pollution episode is driving exposure across the St Thomas' Hospital catchment. Modelled respiratory pressure has reached RPI 44.1/100 (amber), with a projected surge peak in roughly 1 days.
evidence: Top driver: roadside (29-study traffic-asthma evidence) [System climate research graph]
st-thomas.projectedImpact: Projected 75 respiratory cases against 72 surge beds — a ~3-bed shortfall.
recommendedPreparation: Pre-position oxygen and nebulisers (≈3-bed shortfall projected)
Add a respiratory-ward shift across the 5-7 day surge window
Proactively contact high-risk COPD/asthma patients in the catchment
